description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push to the main branch and on pull requests. The workflow should have two jobs: Windows and Linux. The Windows job runs on a Windows 2022 environment, checks out the code, sets up Python 3.10, installs necessary packages and modules, sets up the MSVC compiler, downloads dependencies, compiles the code, and runs tests. The Linux job runs on an ubuntu-latest environment with a container, uses a matrix strategy to test multiple targets, checks out the code, downloads dependencies, compiles the code, and runs tests.
